candidates.description: Automate a 30-day cross-cohort churn analysis with baseline comparison, rank cohorts by risk, and generate a concise summary with mitigation actions.
triggerPatterns: run a 30-day churn analysis across cohorts
which cohort has highest churn risk

candidates.description: Automate retrieval (MCP route-007) and concise summary of monthly API calculation usage (used, limit, remaining, month/year, and % used).
triggerPatterns: how many api calculations have i used this month
what's my api calculation usage for the month

candidates.description: Generate an Approval to Execute (or Do Not Send) compliance memo by ingesting campaign brief, audience, legal basis, suppressions, data handling/tracking, content/disclosures, and operational controls, then outputting a structured memo with final sign-off conditions.
triggerPatterns: produce an approval to execute compliance memo
create a do not send notice
